---
title: Resume
description: "Ihsan Kahveci's Resume"
date: 2024-10-21
published-title: Last updated
---

```{=html}
<style>
#title-block-header .description { display: none; }
.embed-container {
    position: relative;
    padding-bottom: 129%;
    height: 0;
    overflow: hidden;
    max-width: 100%;
}
.embed-container iframe,
.embed-container object,
.embed-container embed {
    position: absolute;
    top: 0;
    left: 0;
    width: 100%;
    height: 100%;
}
</style>

<p class="text-center">
  <a class="btn btn-primary btn-lg resume-download" href="resume.pdf" target="_blank">
    <i class="fa-solid fa-file-arrow-down"></i>&ensp;Download current Resume
  </a>
</p>

<div class="embed-container">
  <iframe src="resume.pdf" style="border: 0.5px"></iframe>
</div>
```
